Title: Relates to dedicating a portion of the state highway system in the hamlet of Uniondale to Jomani "Jo-Jo" Wright
Summary: Designates a portion of the state highway system in the hamlet of Uniondale to Jomani "Jo-Jo" Wright.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law, in relation to dedicating a portion of the state highway system in the hamlet of Uniondale to Jomani "Jo-Jo" Wright
